title: The Mathematical Physics of Continuity: Differentiation, Identity, Lineage, and the Geometry of Propagation
author: Leon Powdar

next.title: The Geometry of Coherence
next.open_question: What maintains coherence between interpretation and identity under conditions of drift, pressure, and competing coordinates?

abstract: Continuity is not located in the persistence of instances, but in the lineage relation linking admissible trajectories under a differentiated identity coordinate across discontinuous spacetime.
